SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-24-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-24-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2013 - JUDGMENT.
